title: Jenkins Insurance Agency — The Woodlands TX Demo Site

requirements.text: Create a new top-level page component `JenkinsPublicSite.tsx` that assembles the entire Jenkins Insurance Agency single-page demo site. Set the document title to exactly: 'Independent Insurance Agent | The Woodlands TX | Jenkins Insurance'. Register this page as the index route in App.tsx, replacing the current default route.

quotes: Page title must say: 'Independent Insurance Agent | The Woodlands TX | Jenkins Insurance'

acceptanceCriteria: Browser tab/title reads exactly 'Independent Insurance Agent | The Woodlands TX | Jenkins Insurance'
Page loads as the default index route
No mention of 'Los Angeles' or 'Reeves Insurance' anywhere on the page

requirements.text: Build a sticky responsive navigation header with navy (#1B3A6B) background. Include the Jenkins Insurance logo/wordmark on the left, desktop nav links (Home, Coverage, About, Reviews, Contact), a visible phone number '(281) 410-8934' as a clickable tel: link, a gold 'Get Free Quote' CTA button, and a hamburger menu for mobile that opens a slide-down drawer. Header should gain a drop shadow on scroll.
acceptanceCriteria: Header sticks to top on scroll
Phone number (281) 410-8934 appears as a tappable link
Mobile hamburger opens/closes full nav drawer
Gold 'Get Free Quote' button scrolls to the quote form section

requirements.text: Build a full-screen hero section with a two-column layout. Left column: H1 headline 'Your Local Insurance Agent in The Woodlands, TX', subheadline copy establishing trust, two CTA buttons ('Get Your Free Quote' and 'Call (281) 410-8934'), and 3 inline trust badges (No Setup Fees, 5-Day Launch, 30-Day Guarantee). Right column: floating agent photo placeholder with a gold border frame, a floating Google review card showing 4.9★. Background: navy-to-dark-navy gradient. The very first 10 words visible on mobile must communicate immediate value to a Texas insurance agent prospect.

quotes: the very first thing I will do is open it on my phone and read the first 10 words visible on screen

acceptanceCriteria: First 10 words on mobile viewport make a compelling value statement for a Texas insurance agent
CTA button links to tel:(281)410-8934
Location reads 'The Woodlands, TX' — not any other city
Hero is full viewport height on desktop, tall but scrollable on mobile

requirements.text: Build a gold (#F4B942) trust bar below the hero with 4 animated count-up stats: '500+ Families Served', '4.9★ Google Rating', '20+ Carrier Partners', '100% Local Texas Agent'. Stats animate from 0 to final value when scrolled into view using IntersectionObserver.
acceptanceCriteria: Bar uses gold #F4B942 background with navy text
Count-up animation triggers on scroll into view
All 4 stats visible on mobile in a 2x2 grid

requirements.text: Build a carrier partner badge row showing logos/name badges for: Progressive, Travelers, Nationwide, Liberty Mutual, Safeco, and Foremost. Use grayscale badges that colorize on hover. Include a heading 'Trusted Carrier Partners'.
acceptanceCriteria: All 6 carriers listed
Badges are responsive and wrap cleanly on mobile
Hover effect applies colorization or opacity change

requirements.text: Build a 'Why Choose Jenkins Insurance' section with 3 cards in a row. Cards: (1) Independent Agent — Access to 20+ carriers for the best rates, (2) Local The Woodlands Expert — Knows the TX market personally, (3) Personalized Service — Real agent, not a call center. Each card has an icon, title, body copy, and a lift+shadow hover effect. Section background: white or light cream.
acceptanceCriteria: 3 cards display in a row on desktop, stacked on mobile
Hover effect is visible on desktop
No mention of any location other than The Woodlands TX

requirements.text: Build a 3×2 coverage types grid with 6 cards: Home Insurance, Auto Insurance, Business Insurance, Flood Insurance, RV Insurance, Life Insurance. Each card has a relevant icon, short description, and a 'Get a Quote' link that scrolls to the contact form. Use navy card headers and white card bodies.
acceptanceCriteria: All 6 coverage types present
'Get a Quote' links scroll to the quote form section
Grid is 3 columns on desktop, 2 on tablet, 1 on mobile

requirements.text: Build a navy 'About C. Jenkins' section. Left side: agent photo placeholder, credential badges (Licensed TX Agent, Independent Broker, 10+ Years Experience). Right side: personal story copy about serving The Woodlands TX community, 3 inline stat boxes (Families Served, Carriers, Years). Background: navy #1B3A6B with white/gold text.
acceptanceCriteria: Agent name reads 'C. Jenkins' — no other name
Location references The Woodlands TX only
Section is responsive with stacked layout on mobile

requirements.text: Build a Google Reviews section showing an aggregate rating summary (4.9/5, 47 reviews) and 3 testimonial cards. Each card includes a reviewer name, star rating (5★), review text relevant to Texas insurance needs, and a 'Posted on Google' badge. Use IntersectionObserver for staggered fade-in animation on scroll.
acceptanceCriteria: Aggregate 4.9★ rating displayed prominently
3 testimonial cards with 5-star ratings
Cards animate in on scroll
Reviews reference The Woodlands TX area

requirements.text: Build a quote request + contact section on a navy gradient background. Left side: a quote form with fields for Full Name, Phone, Email, ZIP Code, Coverage Type (dropdown), and Best Time to Call, plus a gold submit button. Right side: a contact info card showing address '33018 Tamina Rd, The Woodlands TX 77354', phone '(281) 410-8934', business hours, and a WhatsApp link. Assign this section the anchor id='quote'.

quotes: Address = 33018 Tamina Rd, The Woodlands TX 77354

acceptanceCriteria: Section has id='quote' for scroll targeting
Address reads '33018 Tamina Rd, The Woodlands TX 77354'
Phone reads '(281) 410-8934'
Form submits via the existing useSubmitQuote hook or equivalent
Gold submit button is prominent

requirements.text: Build a Spanish/bilingual section with a brief message in both English and Spanish inviting Spanish-speaking clients to get a free quote. Example: 'Hablamos Español — Se Habla Español. Llámenos hoy para una cotización gratuita.' Include a call-to-action button linking to tel:(281)410-8934.
acceptanceCriteria: Section contains both English and Spanish text
CTA button links to (281) 410-8934
Section is visually distinct (e.g., gold accent background stripe)

requirements.text: Build a 3-column footer with: Column 1 — Jenkins Insurance logo, tagline, address '33018 Tamina Rd, The Woodlands TX 77354', phone '(281) 410-8934'. Column 2 — Quick Links (Coverage types). Column 3 — Service Areas (The Woodlands, Conroe, Spring, Tomball, Humble, Cypress TX). Bottom strip: copyright, license disclaimer, privacy policy link. Background: dark navy.

quotes: Address = 33018 Tamina Rd, The Woodlands TX 77354

acceptanceCriteria: Address and phone are correct everywhere in footer
All service areas are in Texas — no other state
Footer is 3 columns on desktop, stacked on mobile

requirements.text: Implement a floating WhatsApp button (bottom-right, fixed position) that is visible and accessible on ALL screen sizes — desktop, tablet, and mobile. It must use a WhatsApp green circle with a WhatsApp icon and a pulsing animation ring. The link must open `https://wa.me/12814108934` in a new tab. The button must NOT be hidden at any breakpoint.

quotes: WhatsApp button must be visible on EVERY screen size

acceptanceCriteria: Button visible on mobile (≤640px), tablet (641–1024px), and desktop (>1024px) — never hidden
Tapping opens wa.me/12814108934
Pulsing green animation ring is present
Button does not overlap or obscure critical content

requirements.text: Implement a mobile sticky bottom action bar (fixed, bottom of screen, mobile-only) with two buttons side-by-side: 'Call Now' linking to tel:(281)410-8934 and 'Get Quote' scrolling to #quote. This bar should only appear on screens ≤768px wide.
acceptanceCriteria: Visible only on mobile (≤768px)
'Call Now' dials (281) 410-8934
'Get Quote' scrolls smoothly to the quote form
Does not overlap the WhatsApp floating button

requirements.text: Apply global design system: primary font Montserrat (headings), secondary font Open Sans (body), loaded from Google Fonts. Primary color Navy #1B3A6B, accent Gold #F4B942, success Green #27AE60. All section scroll-in animations use IntersectionObserver with a 0.1 threshold and translateY(30px) → translateY(0) + opacity fade. All CSS custom properties defined in index.css for the Jenkins brand.
acceptanceCriteria: Montserrat used for all headings site-wide
Open Sans used for all body text
Navy/Gold/Green color system consistent across all sections
Scroll animations trigger on every section as user scrolls down

requirements.text: Ensure the entire frontend bundle is optimized for sub-3-second load time on mobile: lazy-load any images, use lightweight SVG icons instead of icon libraries where possible, minimize third-party script dependencies, and ensure no blocking render resources.

quotes: The demo link I send to clients must load in under 3 seconds

acceptanceCriteria: Images use loading='lazy' attribute
No unnecessary third-party scripts block rendering
Lighthouse performance score ≥ 85 on mobile simulation

constraints: Every location reference must be 'The Woodlands, TX' — no other city or state
Phone number must be (281) 410-8934 everywhere it appears
Agent name must be C. Jenkins everywhere — no other agent name
Address must be 33018 Tamina Rd, The Woodlands TX 77354 everywhere it appears
WhatsApp button must NOT be hidden at any CSS breakpoint
Do not modify files in frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
Do not reference 'Reeves Insurance', 'Johnathan Reeves', or 'Los Angeles' anywhere in the new components
nonGoals: Backend data model changes are not required — quote form can use existing useSubmitQuote hook
Admin dashboard changes are out of scope
Real-time WhatsApp API integration is out of scope — link-based wa.me button only
Calendly or calendar booking integration is out of scope
Actual Google Maps embed is out of scope — address text display only
Internet Identity / authentication changes are out of scope

required: Professional headshot placeholder for insurance agent C. Jenkins — friendly, trustworthy male agent in business casual attire, navy blue background, warm Texas feel (agent-photo.dim_400x500.png)
Jenkins Insurance Agency logo — clean wordmark with a navy shield icon and gold accent, white background (jenkins-logo.dim_300x80.png)
Hero section background — Texas sky at golden hour over The Woodlands TX suburban landscape, warm and professional (hero-bg.dim_1920x1080.png)
